Drew (Hastings).note: Pitched in 2026 opener vs Blind Brook. Part of 2025 Section 1 Class B finalist team.

Dileo (Hastings).note: Pitched in 2026 opener vs Blind Brook. Part of 2025 Section 1 Class B finalist team.

Sawyer Chalsen (Irvington).note: Hit first HS HR in May 2025. Likely returning.

Lucas Constantine (Irvington).note: First varsity hit May 2025. Likely returning underclassman.

games.note: Highlighted in 10-1 win, no box score stats available
Highlighted in 10-1 win, no box score stats available

Ryan Lockwood (Ardsley).note: Featured in scrimmage post vs DF (Mar 19).

Ryan Gentry (Tuckahoe).note: Announced Mar 22 via @tuckahoevarsitybaseball. Part of 3x Section 1 Class C championship team.

Connor Brice (Tuckahoe).note: Signed D1 with Villanova for baseball. Two-sport athlete. Struck out 14 in 2025 Section 1 Class C championship Game 1 vs Haldane.

Patrick Shields (Haldane).note: Tagged in 2025 sectional playoff post vs Tuckahoe.

newsLog.text: Hastings vs Westlake at Disney Wide World of Sports scheduled for Mar 31 at 6:00 PM. Two DF schedule opponents face off.
Hastings-Blind Brook score corrected to 6-2 (was 5-2 per Instagram). Source: Hastings HS DigitalSports official schedule.
Added DigitalSports (Section 1 school athletics sites) as a regular source. Provides official schedules, scores, and venue data.
Westlake vs Valhalla at Disney ESPN Wide World of Sports today at 3:30pm. Both Division B teams at same spring break tournament.
Haldane hosts Peekskill today at 5:00 PM per GameDay One.
Hastings at Disney World spring trip. Played Pelham at Disney Stadium (non-league). Score not yet posted.
Westlake 4, Bronxville 3. Westlake gets first W of 2026 at ESPN Wide World of Sports (Disney).
EAGLES WIN 8-3: DF defeats Saunders at Gould Park. Record: 2-0.
Tuckahoe JV tied Putnam Valley JV 5-5.
Irvington 10-1 win. John Salvatore and Justin Corniel highlighted.
Rye Neck 8, Pawling 2 (non-league).
Irvington JV 18, Saunders 1. Saunders JV program struggling early.
Westlake opened at Panas after two rainouts. Score not confirmed.
EAGLES WIN 6-2: DF defeats Irvington in season opener at Memorial Park.
Game moved from Gould Park to Memorial Park (Dow's Lane) in Irvington.
Hastings 5, Blind Brook 2. Hastings wins opener. Coach Stampfl's 100th career win.
Ardsley lost 2026 opener to Pleasantville.
GameChanger: Varsity now has 4 games loaded. Live-scored Irvington game.
Instagram @dfeaglesbaseball: Season opener post, venue change to Memorial Park. 18 likes.
Instagram @dfvarsity_baseball: Bio updated to '0-0 | Burma counter: 1'. 284 followers.
DFSD DigitalSports: Full varsity schedule published — 21 games.
GameChanger: JV fully loaded (14 games, 14 players).
Instagram @dfvarsity_baseball: Game-day hype post — 'Tip plays baseball today. Game location tbd.' 36 likes.
Instagram @df_diamond_club: BINGO fundraiser recap at Doubledays.
Instagram @dfvarsity_baseball: Scrimmage post — Jack Rizzo and team vs Ardsley, first scrim of the year. 39 likes.
Instagram @dfeaglesbaseball: 2026 schedule posted (pinned).

opponentResults.note: Irvington 10-1 win. Opponent not confirmed. John Salvatore and Justin Corniel highlighted.
JV game. Saunders gave up 18 runs to Irvington JV.
Westlake 2026 opener at Panas (after two rain outs). Score not confirmed.
Westlake first W of 2026. ESPN Wide World of Sports (Disney) tournament.

Ardsley.intel: Scrimmaged DF on Mar 19. Lost 2026 opener to Pleasantville on Mar 24. New captains Carter Bucci and Nate Cal announced.

Blind Brook.intel: Captains Robbie Cuesta and Elliot Zwicker return as seniors. 2026 record: 0-1. Lost league opener to Hastings 2-6 at home. (Source: Hastings HS DigitalSports)

Edgemont.intel: Small program with limited public presence. First game on the DF schedule (Apr 7). No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Haldane.intel: Historic pedigree — 8x Sectional, 5x Regional Champs. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Hastings.intel: 2025 Section 1 Class B Finalists. 2026 record: 1-0. Beat Blind Brook 6-2 in league opener (corrected from 5-2). Coach Stampfl's 100th career win. Disney World spring trip: vs Pelham Mar 30 at ESPN WWOS Stadium, at Westlake Mar 31 at Disney. Then at Eastchester Apr 4. (Source: Hastings HS DigitalSports, @hastingsbase)

Irvington.intel: DF beat them 6-2 on Mar 24 in the season opener. Irvington won 10-1 on Mar 26 (opponent unconfirmed). John Salvatore and Justin Corniel highlighted. 2026 record: 1-1. (Source: @dawgs_bsbl)

Leffell School.intel: Small private school in Hartsdale. Class C program. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Pearl River.intel: Bigger school from Rockland County. Non-league game. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Rye Neck.intel: 2026 record: 1-0. Beat Pawling 8-2 on Mar 26 (non-league). (Source: Pawling HS website)

Saunders.intel: Yonkers vocational school. DF beat Saunders 8-3 on Mar 27 (home opener, Gould Park). Irvington JV beat Saunders 18-1 on Mar 26. 2026 record: 0-2. (Source: @dfeaglesbaseball, Irvington HS digitalsports)

Sleepy Hollow.intel: Head Coach Hunter Glashoff. Non-league game. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Tuckahoe.intel: Defending Section 1 Class C Champions. 14x Section 1 Champs, 7x Regional, 3x State. Four named 2026 captains (Gentry, Romeo, Brice, Briante). Connor Brice signed D1 with Villanova for baseball. Running spring break clinics, active preseason. JV tied Putnam Valley 5-5 on Mar 27. (Source: @tuckahoe_athletics, Putnam Valley digitalsports)

Valhalla.intel: At Disney ESPN Wide World of Sports tournament for spring break. Playing Westlake on Mar 30 at 3:30pm. First 2026 game activity confirmed. (Source: @westlakewildcatsbaseball)

Westlake.intel: At Disney ESPN Wide World of Sports tournament. Beat Bronxville 4-3 on Mar 29 for first W of 2026. Playing Valhalla on Mar 30 at 3:30pm (both Division B teams at same tournament). (Source: @westlakewildcatsbaseball)
